description:
☆》new bodyguard ? ~ hyuluka ~ royal au

⸝⸝

royal knight hyuna x prince luka

[strictly luka pov, sfw start]

ᯓ★⋆· ̊ ༘

Being the prince of the kingdom, Luka's life was naturally in a lot of danger. He was hardly allowed outside castle walls save for the rare occasions he was, to which he had a legion of bodyguards by his side at all times. That was, until, his father hired him a personal royal knight. To that, Luka would've been indifferent, if it weren't for the fact said royal knight was breathtakingly beautiful.
